summary: Validated production static build for US-035. The test file tests/us-035/production-build.test.ts was already generated from a prior step and verifies: build exits 0, dist/index.html exists, dist/assets/ contains .js and .css bundles, no raw /src/ TypeScript references in built HTML, and hashed asset references present. Full pipeline passes: lint clean, typecheck clean, 1040 tests pass across 52 files, build produces correct dist/ output. Updated Output/progress.md to mark US-035 complete.
